new_classes.label_en: Still Fermented Beverage from Concentrated Grape Must in Containers of More Than 2 Litres (CN 22060089)
new_classes.label_de: Stilles Gärerzeugnis aus konzentriertem Traubenmost in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 Litern (KN 22060089)
new_classes.definition_en: Fermented beverage that is not the product of the natural fermentation of fresh grape must but is obtained from concentrated grape must, presented in containers of more than 2 litres; classified under CN subheading 22060089 (Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the three primary distinguishing criteria for CN 22060089: (1) it is a fermented beverage (subclass of FermentedBeverage), (2) it is presented in containers of more than 2 litres (decimalRange minExclusive 2 on maxContainerVolumeL), and (3) it is produced from concentrated grape must rather than from natural fermentation of fresh grape must (indicated via the producedBy restriction and the class definition). The non-sparkling/still character is captured by isCarbonated=false. Coverage is not complete (0.75) because the legal note text is partially truncated (the description of how fermentation is typically arrested is cut off), and there is no dedicated OWL property in the TBox to formally express 'derived from concentrated grape must as opposed to fresh grape must' — the existing FruitFermentation process class is an imperfect proxy for the grape-must-based fermentation. A dedicated ConcentratedGrapeMustFermentation process class and a property linking the product to its must origin would provide fuller coverage, but reuse of existing vocabulary is preferred over unnecessary proliferation.
